  "text": "The dashboard JSON model versioning and migration system in grafana/grafana (sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec) is implemented across two main packages:\n\n## 1. Schema Version Migration Package: `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/schemaversion/`\n\nThis is the core migration package. Key files:\n\n- **`migrations.go`**: Defines constants `MIN_VERSION=0` and `LATEST_VERSION=42`, the `SchemaVersionMigrationFunc` type, the `DataSourceInfoProvider` interface, `GetMigrations()` which returns a map of version number → migration function, and `GetSchemaVersion()` to extract the current schema version from a dashboard map.\n\n- **`errors.go`**: Defines `MigrationError` and `MinimumVersionError` types used throughout migrations.\n\n- **`migration_utils.go`**: Utility functions shared across version migrations.\n\n- **`datasource_utils.go`**: Contains `MigrateDatasourceNameToRef()` and other datasource-related migration helpers matching the frontend `DashboardMigrator.ts` logic.\n\n- **`v2.go` through `v42.go`**: Individual field-level migration functions (V2–V42) that upgrade dashboard JSON from one schema version to the next. Each function updates `dashboard[\"schemaVersion\"]` and applies the necessary field transformations. Notable migrations include:\n  - V2: Services filter migration (legacy `services.filter` → `time`/`templating`)\n  - V6: Drop-downs/pulldowns to annotations migration\n  - V7: Nav to timepicker conversion\n  - V9: Singlestat panel threshold cleanup\n  - V14: `sharedCrosshair` boolean to `graphTooltip` integer\n  - V16: Row-based layout to modern grid-based layout\n  - V28: Deprecated variable property removal\n  - V33: Datasource string references to structured `{uid, type, apiVersion}` objects\n  - V36: Panel datasource reference migration with datasource info provider\n  - V38: Table display mode cell options migration\n  - V41: Legacy `time_options` removal from timepicker\n  - V42: Latest migration\n\n## 2. Migration Orchestrator: `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/`\n\n- **`migrate.go`**: Implements the `migrator` struct and `Migrate()` function which orchestrates running the appropriate version migration functions in sequence from the current schema version up to the target version.\n\n- **`frontend_defaults.go`**: `ApplyDefaults()` function that applies frontend-equivalent default values to dashboard JSON, including special logic for graph panel migration.\n\n- **`metrics.go`**: Prometheus metrics (`MDashboardConversionSuccessTotal`, `MDashboardConversionFailureTotal`) for tracking migration success/failure.\n\n## 3. API Version Conversion: `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/conversion/`\n\n- **`conversion.go`**: Main conversion handler for converting between different Kubernetes API versions (v0alpha1, v1beta1, v2alpha1, v2beta1).\n- **`v0.go`**: `Convert_V0_to_V1()` — converts v0alpha1 to v1beta1 dashboards, calling `migration.Migrate()` to update schema version to `LATEST_VERSION`.\n- **`v1.go`**: v1beta1 conversion logic.\n- **`v2.go`**: v2alpha1 conversion logic.\n- **`v2alpha1_to_v2beta1.go`**: Specific conversion between v2alpha1 and v2beta1 API versions.\n- **`errors.go`**: Conversion-specific error types.\n- **`metrics.go`**: Conversion metrics with schema version tracking.\n\n## 4. Schema Version Constants: `pkg/kinds/dashboard/addenda.go`\n\nDefines `HandoffSchemaVersion = 36`, which is the minimum schema version where the Thema-based dashboard schema is valid. Dashboards below this version require the frontend TypeScript `DashboardMigrator` to run first before Go backend migration can proceed."
}

API Version Conversion: apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/conversion/\n\n- conversion.go: Main conversion handler for converting between different Kubernetes API versions (v0alpha1, v1beta1, v2alpha1, v2beta1).\n- v0.go: Convert_V0_to_V1() converts v0alpha1 to v1beta1 dashboards, calling migration.Migrate() to update schema version to LATEST_VERSION.\n- v1.go: v1beta1 conversion logic.\n- v2.go: v2alpha1 conversion logic.\n- v2alpha1_to_v2beta1.go: Specific conversion between v2alpha1 and v2beta1 API versions.\n- errors.go: Conversion-specific error types.\n- metrics.go: Conversion metrics with schema version tracking.\n\n## 4. Schema Version Constants: pkg/kinds/dashboard/addenda.go\n\nDefines HandoffSchemaVersion = 36, the minimum schema version where the Thema-based dashboard schema is valid. 14: type SchemaVersionMigrationFunc func(context.Context, map[string]interface{}) error
15: 
16: type DataSourceInfo struct {
17: 	Default    bool
18: 	UID        string
19: 	Name       string
20: 	Type       string
21: 	ID         int64
22: 	APIVersion string
23: }
24: 
25: type DataSourceInfoProvider interface {
26: 	// GetDataSourceInfo returns a list of all data sources with their info
27: 	// The context must have the namespace in it
28: 	GetDataSourceInfo(ctx context.Context) []DataSourceInfo
29: }
30: 
31: type PanelPluginInfo struct {
32: 	ID      string
33: 	Version string
34: }
35: 
36: func GetMigrations(dsInfoProvider DataSourceInfoProvider) map[int]SchemaVersionMigrationFunc {
37: 	return map[int]SchemaVersionMigrationFunc{
38: 		2:  V2,

68: 		32: V32,
69: 		33: V33(dsInfoProvider),
70: 		34: V34,
71: 		35: V35,

73: 		37: V37,
74: 		38: V38,
75: 		39: V39,

81: 
82: func GetSchemaVersion(dash map[string]interface{}) int {
83: 	if v, ok := dash["schemaVersion"]; ok {
84: 		switch v := v.(type) {
85: 		case int:
86: 			return v
87: 		case float64:
88: 			return int(v)
89: 		case string:
90: 			if version, err := strconv.Atoi(v); err == nil {
91: 				return version
92: 			}
93: 			return 0
94: 		}
95: 	}
96: 	return 0
97: }

  "text": "The dashboard JSON model versioning and migration system in grafana/grafana (sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec) is implemented across two main packages:\n\n## 1. Schema Version Migration Package: `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/schemaversion/`\n\nThis is the core migration package. Key files:\n\n- **`migrations.go`**: Defines constants `MIN_VERSION=0` and `LATEST_VERSION=42`, the `SchemaVersionMigrationFunc` type, the `DataSourceInfoProvider` interface, `GetMigrations()` which returns a map of version number → migration function, and `GetSchemaVersion()` to extract the current schema version from a dashboard map.\n\n- **`errors.go`**: Defines `MigrationError` and `MinimumVersionError` types used throughout migrations.\n\n- **`migration_utils.go`**: Utility functions shared across version migrations.\n\n- **`datasource_utils.go`**: Contains `MigrateDatasourceNameToRef()` and other datasource-related migration helpers matching the frontend `DashboardMigrator.ts` logic.\n\n- **`v2.go` through `v42.go`**: Individual field-level migration functions (V2–V42) that upgrade dashboard JSON from one schema version to the next. Each function updates `dashboard[\"schemaVersion\"]` and applies the necessary field transformations. Notable migrations include:\n  - V2: Services filter migration (legacy `services.filter` → `time`/`templating`)\n  - V6: Drop-downs/pulldowns to annotations migration\n  - V7: Nav to timepicker conversion\n  - V9: Singlestat panel threshold cleanup\n  - V14: `sharedCrosshair` boolean to `graphTooltip` integer\n  - V16: Row-based layout to modern grid-based layout\n  - V28: Deprecated variable property removal\n  - V33: Datasource string references to structured `{uid, type, apiVersion}` objects\n  - V36: Panel datasource reference migration with datasource info provider\n  - V38: Table display mode cell options migration\n  - V41: Legacy `time_options` removal from timepicker\n  - V42: Latest migration\n\n## 2. Migration Orchestrator: `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/`\n\n- **`migrate.go`**: Implements the `migrator` struct and `Migrate()` function which orchestrates running the appropriate version migration functions in sequence from the current schema version up to the target version.\n\n- **`frontend_defaults.go`**: `ApplyDefaults()` function that applies frontend-equivalent default values to dashboard JSON, including special logic for graph panel migration.\n\n- **`metrics.go`**: Prometheus metrics (`MDashboardConversionSuccessTotal`, `MDashboardConversionFailureTotal`) for tracking migration success/failure.\n\n## 3. API Version Conversion: `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/conversion/`\n\n- **`conversion.go`**: Main conversion handler for converting between different Kubernetes API versions (v0alpha1, v1beta1, v2alpha1, v2beta1).\n- **`v0.go`**: `Convert_V0_to_V1()` — converts v0alpha1 to v1beta1 dashboards, calling `migration.Migrate()` to update schema version to `LATEST_VERSION`.\n- **`v1.go`**: v1beta1 conversion logic.\n- **`v2.go`**: v2alpha1 conversion logic.\n- **`v2alpha1_to_v2beta1.go`**: Specific conversion between v2alpha1 and v2beta1 API versions.\n- **`errors.go`**: Conversion-specific error types.\n- **`metrics.go`**: Conversion metrics with schema version tracking.\n\n## 4. Schema Version Constants: `pkg/kinds/dashboard/addenda.go`\n\nDefines `HandoffSchemaVersion = 36`, which is the minimum schema version where the Thema-based dashboard schema is valid. Dashboards below this version require the frontend TypeScript `DashboardMigrator` to run first before Go backend migration can proceed."

  "text": "The dashboard JSON model versioning and migration system in grafana/grafana (sg-evals/grafana--26d36ec) is implemented across two main packages:\n\n## 1. Schema Version Migration Package: `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/schemaversion/`\n\nThis is the core migration package. Key files:\n\n- **`migrations.go`**: Defines constants `MIN_VERSION=0` and `LATEST_VERSION=42`, the `SchemaVersionMigrationFunc` type, the `DataSourceInfoProvider` interface, `GetMigrations()` which returns a map of version number → migration function, and `GetSchemaVersion()` to extract the current schema version from a dashboard map.\n\n- **`errors.go`**: Defines `MigrationError` and `MinimumVersionError` types used throughout migrations.\n\n- **`migration_utils.go`**: Utility functions shared across version migrations.\n\n- **`datasource_utils.go`**: Contains `MigrateDatasourceNameToRef()` and other datasource-related migration helpers matching the frontend `DashboardMigrator.ts` logic.\n\n- **`v2.go` through `v42.go`**: Individual field-level migration functions (V2–V42) that upgrade dashboard JSON from one schema version to the next. Each function updates `dashboard[\"schemaVersion\"]` and applies the necessary field transformations. Notable migrations include:\n  - V2: Services filter migration (legacy `services.filter` → `time`/`templating`)\n  - V6: Drop-downs/pulldowns to annotations migration\n  - V7: Nav to timepicker conversion\n  - V9: Singlestat panel threshold cleanup\n  - V14: `sharedCrosshair` boolean to `graphTooltip` integer\n  - V16: Row-based layout to modern grid-based layout\n  - V28: Deprecated variable property removal\n  - V33: Datasource string references to structured `{uid, type, apiVersion}` objects\n  - V36: Panel datasource reference migration with datasource info provider\n  - V38: Table display mode cell options migration\n  - V41: Legacy `time_options` removal from timepicker\n  - V42: Latest migration\n\n## 2. Migration Orchestrator: `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/`\n\n- **`migrate.go`**: Implements the `migrator` struct and `Migrate()` function which orchestrates running the appropriate version migration functions in sequence from the current schema version up to the target version.\n\n- **`frontend_defaults.go`**: `ApplyDefaults()` function that applies frontend-equivalent default values to dashboard JSON, including special logic for graph panel migration.\n\n- **`metrics.go`**: Prometheus metrics (`MDashboardConversionSuccessTotal`, `MDashboardConversionFailureTotal`) for tracking migration success/failure.\n\n## 3. API Version Conversion: `apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/conversion/`\n\n- **`conversion.go`**: Main conversion handler for converting between different Kubernetes API versions (v0alpha1, v1beta1, v2alpha1, v2beta1).\n- **`v0.go`**: `Convert_V0_to_V1()` — converts v0alpha1 to v1beta1 dashboards, calling `migration.Migrate()` to update schema version to `LATEST_VERSION`.\n- **`v1.go`**: v1beta1 conversion logic.\n- **`v2.go`**: v2alpha1 conversion logic.\n- **`v2alpha1_to_v2beta1.go`**: Specific conversion between v2alpha1 and v2beta1 API versions.\n- **`errors.go`**: Conversion-specific error types.\n- **`metrics.go`**: Conversion metrics with schema version tracking.\n\n## 4. Schema Version Constants: `pkg/kinds/dashboard/addenda.go`\n\nDefines `HandoffSchemaVersion = 36`, which is the minimum schema version where the Thema-based dashboard schema is valid. Dashboards below this version require the frontend TypeScript `DashboardMigrator` to run first before Go backend migration can proceed."

Key files:\n\n- migrations.go: Defines constants MIN_VERSION=0 and LATEST_VERSION=42, the SchemaVersionMigrationFunc type, the DataSourceInfoProvider interface, GetMigrations() which returns a map of version number to migration function, and GetSchemaVersion() to extract the current schema version from a dashboard map.\n\n- errors.go: Defines MigrationError and MinimumVersionError types used throughout migrations.\n\n- migration_utils.go: Utility functions shared across version migrations.\n\n- datasource_utils.go: Contains MigrateDatasourceNameToRef() and other datasource-related migration helpers matching the frontend DashboardMigrator.ts logic.\n\n- v2.go through v42.go: Individual field-level migration functions (V2-V42) that upgrade dashboard JSON from one schema version to the next. Each function updates dashboard[schemaVersion] and applies the necessary field transformations. Migration Orchestrator: apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/\n\n- migrate.go: Implements the migrator struct and Migrate() function which orchestrates running the appropriate version migration functions in sequence from the current schema version up to the target version.\n\n- frontend_defaults.go: ApplyDefaults() function that applies frontend-equivalent default values to dashboard JSON, including special logic for graph panel migration.\n\n- metrics.go: Prometheus metrics (MDashboardConversionSuccessTotal, MDashboardConversionFailureTotal) for tracking migration success/failure.\n\n## 3. API Version Conversion: apps/dashboard/pkg/migration/conversion/\n\n- conversion.go: Main conversion handler for converting between different Kubernetes API versions (v0alpha1, v1beta1, v2alpha1, v2beta1).\n- v0.go: Convert_V0_to_V1() converts v0alpha1 to v1beta1 dashboards, calling migration.Migrate() to update schema version to LATEST_VERSION.\n- v1.go: v1beta1 conversion logic.\n- v2.go: v2alpha1 conversion logic.\n- v2alpha1_to_v2beta1.go: Specific conversion between v2alpha1 and v2beta1 API versions.\n- errors.go: Conversion-specific error types.\n- metrics.go: Conversion metrics with schema version tracking.\n\n## 4. Schema Version Constants: pkg/kinds/dashboard/addenda.go\n\nDefines HandoffSchemaVersion = 36, the minimum schema version where the Thema-based dashboard schema is valid. Dashboards below this version require the frontend TypeScript DashboardMigrator to run first before Go backend migration can proceed."
